name: Chocolate Coconut Pecan Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper or grease them.
On a piece of waxed paper, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. In a large bowl, cream butter with an electric mixer until smooth. Add sugar and beat until fluffy. Beat in eggs and vanilla extract, then add melted chocolate and beat well. Gradually mix in the flour mixture until smooth. Stir in the coconut, chopped pecans, and chocolate chips. Using a teaspoon, drop dough onto prepared cookie sheets, leaving about 2 inches between each cookie. Gently press half of the pecans on top of each cookie.
Bake on the middle rack for 10 to 13 minutes, or until set. Transfer cookies to wire racks to cool. Store in airtight containers for up to 1 week or in the freezer for up to 2 months.
